title: PDF Viewer scroll-inner fit (dbg72)
description:
PipeSync PDF Viewer fit width is now measured from the scroll container's inner content box (clientWidth minus scroll padding), not the wider plan panel. Panel-minus-library sizing was demoted because it over-scaled PDFs vs the visible scroll viewport and caused horizontal clipping at the scroll padding edge. Fit safety is 0.98 with no extra pixel inset.

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg72). Open PDF Viewer: each page should fit edge-to-edge inside the scroll window without clipping at the scroll area sides.
changeLog: Fit avail width from scroll inner box (layout clientWidth minus scroll padding).
Clear zoom inline width before measure to avoid circular over-scale.
d9d6c9 ingest logs include scrollPadL/R and layoutClientW.
